headline: Tyson® Debuts New Garlic & Herb, BBQ, and Harissa Chicken Cups
summary: SPRINGDALE, Ark., June 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tyson Foods is expanding the high-performing Tyson Chicken Cups with three bold new flavors: Garlic & Herb, BBQ and Harissa, further strengthening its position in convenient, high-protein options. This latest flavor expansion follows strong momentum for the product launch, including recognition as Product of the Year Winner in the Protein Snack category, a distinction determined by a survey of 40,000 people by Kantar. This reflects the increase
